title: minecraft revised
description:
A revision of the vanilla experience:

Performance / Vanilla-Like / Visual Overhaul / Gameplay Extensions
body:
Minecraft Revised aims to stay true to the vanilla formula of Minecraft. It remains non-obstructive and simple just as the game is intended to be. 

This modpack primarily improves performance, with a few visual overhauls to freshen gameplay. The End dimension has also been extended.

! Enable all provided resource packs for full experience. [More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-mob-variants-fresh-animations-addon/versions) & [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) MUST BE TOP PRIORITY IN RESOURCE PACK LIST

! ([Realistic Health](https://modrinth.com/datapack/realistic-health)) For those who suffer from motion sickness, alter distortion effects to comfortable setting (Options > Video > Quality > Distortion Effects)

<details>
